instruction: Describe the conditions under which this vulnerability can be exploited.
input: Jenkins Debian Package Builder Plugin 1.6.11 and earlier implements functionality that allows agents to invoke command-line `git` at an attacker-specified path on the controller, allowing attackers able to control agent processes to invoke arbitrary OS commands on the controller.
output: The vulnerability can be exploited when an attacker has control over agent processes and can specify a path for the command-line `git` execution on the Jenkins controller.
